form.formComment: Comes here off a 54-day let-up. At the latest run eased back early on 7th of 11 at Santa Anita on February 13 over 1106m, 14 len behind Outrageous carrying 56kg at $14.20. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len at Santa Anita January 16 over 1106m defeating Toulouse Detrac carrying 56kg at $6. Cannot be ruled out despite a plain effort last time.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 4th in a small field at Turf Paradise Turf on March 18 over 1609m, 3 len behind Port Ellen with 55.5kg at $13.40. The race before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 7 at Turf Paradise Turf on February 16 over 1609m, 3.5 len behind Expressive Love with 55.5kg at $5.40. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 44-day let-up. Last start 3rd in a small field at Turf Paradise Turf on February 23 over 1609m, 4 len behind Loveaboveandbeyond with 55.5kg at $7.30. The start before that 4th of 7 at Turf Paradise Turf on January 27 over 1609m, 5.5 len behind Dr Ray D carrying 55.5kg at $13.90. Nice effort last time. Can go on with the job now.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Freshened for 44 days. First-up 4th of 7 at this track on January 1 over 1207m, 10 len behind Pepper Mill with 55.5kg at $8.50.
